📝 Mayor's Blog Update (Published: June 19, 2026)

On Friday, June 19, I was invited to attend and offer remarks at the 20th Annual General Meeting of NPO Aōra, held at the Citizen Activities Center. The organization is marking its 20th anniversary this year.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202606/13864.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: NPO Aōra's 20th Annual General Meeting
